sglang.title: fix: fix illegal cuda memory access at fused_moe_kernel
sglang.author: saltyfish66
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When the Deepseek's prompt length is very long (>40k) and the --chunked-prefill-size is large (>64k), fused_moe_kernel will encounter a cuda illegal memory access error. This pull request aims to fix this error.
In python/sglang/srt/layers/moe/fused_moe_triton/fused_moe.py:
def fused_moe_

sglang.title: [Build] Support build sgl-kernel with ccache
sglang.author: guoyuhong
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Building sgl-kernel costs a lot of time especially when more and more kernels are added to it.
In our experience, it takes about one hour to make a full build in our internal building pipeline(CMAKE_BUILD_PARALLEL_LEVEL=20).


Modifications
This PR enables building sgl-kernel with ccache.

vllm.title: [Bugfix][V1] Fix bug from putting llm_engine.model_executor in a background process
vllm.author: wwl2755
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
V1 has moved the llm_engine.model_executor into a background process, so it has caused some bugs. ( #14532 and #15349 )


This PR fixed the bug for function model_executor.save_sharded_state by sending a request to the background engine core. This directly fix the bug mentioned in #14532 (comment) a

After I added the sliding window and logit soft-capping support to the paged attention Pallas kernel, this PR is intended to added the sliding window and logit soft-capping at the vLLM level, so that we can support gemma model.
Test plans:

pytest -s -v /workspace/vllm/tests/v1/tpu/test_pallas.py
py
